nodes.label: Kubernetes-style liveness probe — no external dependencies.
nodes.norm_label: kubernetes-style liveness probe — no external dependencies.

nodes.label: Kubernetes-style readiness probe — verifies Postgres, MongoDB, and Garage.
nodes.norm_label: kubernetes-style readiness probe — verifies postgres, mongodb, and garage.

nodes.label: Manages async Garage object-storage connections (path-style, SigV4).
nodes.norm_label: manages async garage object-storage connections (path-style, sigv4).

nodes.label: Verify bucket access using an injected request-scoped client.
nodes.norm_label: verify bucket access using an injected request-scoped client.

nodes.norm_label: manages the mongodb database connection and sessions.

nodes.norm_label: establishes a connection to the mongodb database.
